data.title: Cyber Hornet seeks SEC nod for S&P 500 ETFs tied to XRP, Ethereum, Solana
data.description:
Cyber Hornet wants the commission to approve its S&P 500 ETFs linked to XRP, Ethereum, and Solana.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/cyber-hornet-seeks-sec-nod-for-sp-500-etfs/

data.title: Anti-Bitcoin Investment Giant Vanguard Reportedly Considering Crypto ETF Access For Customers In Dramatic U-Turn
data.description:
Vanguard, the $10 trillion asset manager known in crypto circles for blocking client access to Bitcoin exchange-traded funds (ETFs), is reportedly reconsidering its stance on offering its clientele access to such investment vehicles. Vanguard Planning To End Bitcoin ETF Ban According to a Sept. 26 report from Crypto in America, citing anonymous sources familiar with […]
source: https://zycrypto.com/anti-bitcoin-investment-giant-vanguard-reportedly-considering-crypto-etf-access-for-customers-in-dramatic-u-turn/

data.title: Tom Lee: It is healthy to see a pullback in the super cycle, and the macro bull market is not over yet
data.description: “The macro bull market is not over yet, and it’s always very healthy to see a pullback in a super cycle,” Tom Lee, co-founder of Fundstrat and chairman of BitMine, told CNBC.

data.title: Several Solana staking ETFs may win US approval within two weeks: Analyst
data.description:
The two-week approval forecast follows analyst predictions that additional crypto ETF approvals could be a key catalyst for a broader altcoin season.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/solana-staking-etfs-us-approval-prediction-analyst?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Peter Schiff: BTC has been in a long-term invisible bear market, and its growth rate this year lags behind major precious metals
data.description: Economist and cryptocurrency critic Peter Schiff published data on the X platform showing that BTC and ETH's year-to-date gains have lagged behind those of major precious metals, including: platinum, up 74%, silver, up 59%, palladium, up 44%, gold, up 43%, Ethereum, up 20%, and Bitcoin, up 16%. Peter Schiff also pointed out that Bitcoin has been in a long-term "hidden bear market," as its price, measured in gold, is currently 22% below its August 2025 high and 20% below its November 2021 high.

data.title: Euphoria's Official Account Compromised by Hackers
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, the official X account of Euphoria, a crypto derivatives trading application based on MegaETH, was hacked on September 27. The account has since been used to post phishing links, and control remains with the hackers. Users are advised to avoid interacting with the compromised account to safeguard their assets.
source: https://www.binance.com/en/square/post/30238114755354?utm_source=BinanceNewsRSS

data.title: Ethereum spot ETFs saw a total net outflow of $248 million yesterday, marking the fifth consecutive day of net outflows.
data.description: SoSoValue data shows that yesterday (September 26th, US Eastern Time), Ethereum spot ETFs saw a total net outflow of $248 million. The Grayscale Ethereum Trust ETF (ETHE) saw the largest daily net inflow, with a net inflow of $17.91 million, bringing ETHE's total net outflow to $4.57 billion. The 21Shares Ethereum ETF (TETH) followed with a net inflow of $8.05 million, bringing ETHE's total net outflow to $22.57 million. The Blackrock ETHA ETF saw the largest daily net outflow, with a net outflow of $200 million, bringing ETHA's total net inflow to $13.16 billion. As of press time, the total net asset value of the Ethereum spot ETF was US$26.01 billion, the ETF net asset ratio (market value as a percentage of Ethereum's total market value) reached 5.37%, and the historical cumulative net inflow has reached US$13.12 billion.

data.title: Aster's fee revenue surpassed Circle's in the past seven days, with cumulative fee revenue exceeding $100 million.
data.description: According to Defillama data, Aster's fee revenue reached $56.3 million over the past seven days, approximately 2.6 times that of Hyperliquid ($21.75 million). This has now surpassed Circle ($54 million) to temporarily rank second in protocol revenue, behind only Tether ($153.95 million). Furthermore, Aster's cumulative fee revenue has now exceeded $100 million, currently reaching $110.5 million.

data.title: Eric Trump Encourages Buying Amid Market Decline
data.description: According to PANews, Eric Trump, the second son of U.S. President Donald Trump, recently tweeted a suggestion to 'buy the dip.' Eric Trump has previously advised buying during market downturns. On February 4 of this year, he stated that it was the best time to increase holdings in Ethereum (ETH), after which ETH experienced a 40% decline over two months. On August 17, he responded to purchasing $18.6 million worth of Bitcoin and Ethereum, describing it as buying the dip.

data.title: U.S. Stock Market Sees Record Concentration in Top Companies
data.description: According to BlockBeats, recent data from the trading information platform Kobeissi Letter reveals that the top 10% of U.S. stocks by market capitalization now account for 78% of the total U.S. stock market value, marking a historic high. This figure surpasses the previous record set in the 1930s by 3 percentage points and exceeds the peak during the 2000 internet bubble, which was 74%.In contrast, during the 1980s, the total weight of the top 10% of companies by market capitalization was less than 50%. Additionally, the percentage of market value held by the top 10 stocks in the S&P 500 Index has reached a record 41%, indicating an unprecedented level of market concentration.

data.title: Euphoria's Official Account Compromised by Hackers
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, the official X account of Euphoria, a crypto derivatives trading application based on MegaETH, was hacked on September 27. The account has since been used to post phishing links, and control remains with the hackers.

Users are advised to avoid interacting with the compromised account to safeguard their assets.

data.title: Yesterday, the U.S. spot Bitcoin ETF had a net outflow of $418.3 million, and the spot Ethereum ETF had a net outflow of $248.4 million.
data.description: Farside monitoring data showed that the U.S. spot Bitcoin ETF had a net outflow of US$418.3 million yesterday; the spot Ethereum ETF had a net outflow of US$248.4 million.

data.description:
Devconnect 2025 in Buenos Aires is Ethereum’s must-attend “World’s Fair. "

data.title: Tom Lee Discusses Market Trends Amid Supercycle
data.description: According to Foresight News, Tom Lee, co-founder of Fundstrat and chairman of BitMine, shared insights during an interview with CNBC. He stated that the macro bull market is not over and emphasized that experiencing pullbacks during a supercycle is always very healthy.

data.title: 1.583 million UNI transferred from UNI time-locked contracts half a month ago entered Binance through market maker GSR.
data.description: On-chain analyst Ember Monitoring said that 1.583 million UNI (US$11.94 million) transferred from Uniswap's UNI time-lock contract half a month ago was transferred to the market maker GSR address 10 hours ago and then entered Binance.

data.title: Gate HODLer Airdrop has launched over 300 projects, with cumulative rewards value exceeding $294 million
data.description: According to official news, Gate HODLer Airdrop has launched over 300 projects, with cumulative rewards valued at over $294 million. Gate HODLer Airdrop is dedicated to identifying high-quality, high-potential projects and, through this airdrop mechanism, reduces investment risk to zero. Users only need to hold 1 GT to participate in the free airdrop.

data.title: BNB Surpasses 970 USDT with a 2.67% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Sep 27, 2025, 04:25 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, BNB has crossed the 970 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 970.469971 USDT, with a narrowed 2.67% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: Whales have increased their holdings by over 430,000 ETH in the past two days, worth $1.73 billion.
data.description: Lookonchain monitoring shows that whales are continuing to increase their holdings of ETH. In the past two days, 16 wallets have received 431,018 ETH (worth US$1.73 billion) from Kraken, Galaxy Digital, BitGo, FalconX and OKX.

data.title: Hong Kong-listed company Zhiyun International has completed Bitcoin account opening and purchased over 1 BTC
data.description: According to an announcement from the Hong Kong Stock Exchange, Zhiyun International, a Hong Kong-listed company, disclosed that its wholly-owned subsidiary Zhiyun Kuangshi Co., Ltd. has completed the opening of a Bitcoin account at a regulated virtual asset trading platform service provider in Hong Kong, and purchased more than one Bitcoin through the group's internal resources, with an average purchase price of approximately US$118,000 (equivalent to approximately HK$918,000).

data.title: Zhiyun International Purchases Bitcoin in Hong Kong
data.description:
Zhiyun International's subsidiary acquires over one Bitcoin, marking institutional crypto adoption in Hong Kong.
source: https://coincu.com/364907-zhiyun-international-bitcoin-purchase
